description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a dark metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, likely made of metal, which is characteristic of the AK-47 family. The front sight is a post type, and the rear sight is a notched tangent, both made of metal and mounted on the barrel and receiver, respectively. The stock is fixed and made of wood, providing stability and durability. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a simple slant-cut muzzle device, likely a flash hider. The overall finish is a combination of matte black metal and reddish-brown wood, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a matte black metal body, wooden stock and handguard, and a curved metal magazine. The rifle features iron sights and a slant-cut muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
